meta.method: areal interpolation old-SA (statarea_2009_geo) -> 2022 SA; weight = overlap_area * old_pop/old_area; value = weighted mean; cluster = dominant contributor; dom = dominant weight share; cov = share of new-SA area covered by SES-bearing old SAs. m="geo". Sliver filter: overlaps under 5pct of the new SA AND under 15pct of the old SA are dropped when substantial contributors exist. m="q" = quarter fallback (cov<0.25 or no overlap): pop-weighted mean of SES SAs sharing the zfill(4)[:2] quarter prefix — used mainly for East Jerusalem, which is absent from the old geometry layer.
meta.warning: code-equal (semel,sa) join across delineations is unsafe; always use this file for 2022-key lookups
